'''Karke''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Phindian/Legends|Phindian]] from [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]] who was a good friend of [[Senior Anthropologist]] [[Mammon Hoole]] and an [[Sentientologist|anthropologist]] in her own right.

{{Char-stub}}
